title: Produce and harvest royal jelly
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Produce and harvest royal jelly demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to produce and harvest royal jelly

pcs.text: Assess health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks associated with working with bees and apply appropriate control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks associated with working with bees and apply appropriate control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess health and safety in the workplace hazards and risks associated with working with bees and apply appropriate control measures.

pcs.text: Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select, ensure serviceability, fit and use personal protective equipment.

pcs.text: Assess hive for suitability for production of royal jelly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Assess hive for suitability for production of royal jelly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Assess hive for suitability for production of royal jelly.

pcs.text: Prepare hive and introduce artificial queen bee cells
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare hive and introduce artificial queen bee cells?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare hive and introduce artificial queen bee cells.

pcs.text: Graft bee larvae according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Graft bee larvae according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Graft bee larvae according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Stimulate the colony into producing royal jelly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stimulate the colony into producing royal jelly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stimulate the colony into producing royal jelly.

pcs.text: Ensure production equipment is clean and sanitised according to hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure production equipment is clean and sanitised according to hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure production equipment is clean and sanitised according to hygiene procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to produce and harvest royal jelly

elements.title: Collect and store royal jelly

pcs.text: Adhere to hygiene requirements according to food safety and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Adhere to hygiene requirements according to food safety and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Adhere to hygiene requirements according to food safety and workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Ensure royal jelly collection and storage equipment is clean and sanitised according to hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Ensure royal jelly collection and storage equipment is clean and sanitised according to hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Ensure royal jelly collection and storage equipment is clean and sanitised according to hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Remove and discard larvae from queen cells ensuring no contamination of jelly
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and discard larvae from queen cells ensuring no contamination of jelly?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and discard larvae from queen cells ensuring no contamination of jelly.

pcs.text: Harvest royal jelly from each cell according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Harvest royal jelly from each cell according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Harvest royal jelly from each cell according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Prepare the royal jelly for storage according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare the royal jelly for storage according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare the royal jelly for storage according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Place royal jelly into hygienic containers ensuring minimum exposure to contamination and refrigerate according to food safety procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Place royal jelly into hygienic containers ensuring minimum exposure to contamination and refrigerate according to food safety procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Place royal jelly into hygienic containers ensuring minimum exposure to contamination and refrigerate according to food safety procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Collect and store royal jelly

elements.title: Finalise tasks

pcs.text: Check, clean and store equipment according to workplace procedures and hygiene procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check, clean and store equipment according to workplace procedures and hygiene procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check, clean and store equipment according to workplace procedures and hygiene procedures.

pcs.text: Update and maintain records according to workplace procedures and quality assurance procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Update and maintain records according to workplace procedures and quality assurance procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Update and maintain records according to workplace procedures and quality assurance procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Finalise tasks
